description: A smooth or slightly textured spread made primarily from chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and olive oil. It is widely served as a dip, spread, or mezze item.
preparation_steps: Blend chickpeas with tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and salt.
Adjust texture with water or additional olive oil if needed.
Taste and balance acidity and seasoning.

health_advice.benefits: Provides plant protein, fiber, and unsaturated fats.
health_advice.risks: Portion size and added oil can increase calories, especially when paired with fried chips or large amounts of bread.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use it as a spread or dip with vegetables and whole-grain pita rather than relying only on processed snack foods.

dietary_notes.note: The dip itself is usually vegan and gluten-free; bread or crackers served with it may not be.

serving_info.typical_serving: A few spoonfuls to a small bowl
